_comment: session_analytics default configuration — the single source of schema
default values. User configuration lives in the repo-root .env (shared by
the CLI and the Studio config page). Override precedence: defaults.json <
.env < real env vars < CLI flags. See config.py.
'judge.default'/'by_copilot': the DEFAULT judge is local-only Ollama
(model:'' = the backend's default model, llama3), so no session content
leaves the machine unless the user explicitly opts in. Pick a cloud judge
per the .env (CCT_SA_JUDGE_BACKEND/MODEL/BASE_URL) or
`--judge <family>:<model>` — e.g. claude-code:sonnet for Anthropic via the
local claude CLI, or openai:<model> for LM Studio / vLLM / any
OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
'pricing.models': per-model token rates (E5 cost tracking). Rates are
USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Each entry carries its own 'currency' +
'effective_date' (the version stamped onto priced turns). Update this
block (or override it in ~/.cct/session-analytics.json) as list prices
change; a price change never re-prices already-ingested turns (their
cost_usd + cost_price_version reflect the rate effective at ingest — see
specs/session-analytics-cost-tracking/spec.md, D-repricing). A model with
no entry here ingests with cost_usd = NULL (never silently 0), and is
counted + logged as 'unpriced' at the end of ingest. Removing this whole
block restores today's behavior (cost_usd stays NULL for everything).
